testcase.classname: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow
testcase.name: Valid user adds product to cart - #1.1

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of all 0 elements, but no elements were found (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 147.0.3912.86, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 43476, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63630}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 147.0.3912.86 (3a0d90fcf938..., userDataDir: C:\Users\mayan\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63630/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.86, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cb688e966ea1f087f7a236e3df52cd8d

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of all 0 elements, but no elements were found (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 147.0.3912.86, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 43476, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63630}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 147.0.3912.86 (3a0d90fcf938..., userDataDir: C:\Users\mayan\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63630/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.86, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cb688e966ea1f087f7a236e3df52cd8d at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:233) at pageObject.checkoutPage.selectPaymentMethod(checkoutPage.java:137) at stepDefinitions.checkoutStepDefinition.select_payment_method(checkoutStepDefinition.java:46) at ✽.User selects the payment method(file:///C:/Users/mayan/eclipse-workspace/AutomationAmazonWeb/src/test/java/features/AmazonPurchase.feature:39)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on browser....................................................passed When I navigate to Home page of the Amazon web application..................passed And Go to the Hello,Sign in option..........................................passed And Click on the Sign in link...............................................passed Given User enters the valid phone number "8630718216" into the fieldbox.....passed And click on the Continue button............................................passed And Enter the valid password "Kaushik21#" into password field...............passed And Click on the Sign In button.............................................passed Then user should get "success"..............................................passed When User clicks in the search field box....................................passed And User enters the product name "Thermometer"..............................passed And Clicks on the search icon button........................................passed Then All "Thermometer" results should be shown on the page..................passed And The user selects a "Thermometer" product................................passed Then The user navigates to the product details page.........................passed When User clicks on the Add to cart button..................................passed Then User clicks on the No Thanks button....................................passed And Product should add into the cart........................................passed And User clicks on the Go to Cart button....................................passed Then The user verifies product "Thermometer" is present in cart.............passed And The user verifies cart is not empty.....................................passed When User clicks on Proceed to Buy button...................................passed Then User should navigate to the checkout page..............................passed And User selects delivery address...........................................passed Then User should be redirected to payment page..............................passed And User selects the payment method.........................................failed

testcase.classname: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow
testcase.name: Invalid user should not login - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User is on browser....................................................passed When I navigate to Home page of the Amazon web application..................passed And Go to the Hello,Sign in option..........................................passed And Click on the Sign in link...............................................passed Given User enters the valid phone number "7520720735" into the fieldbox.....passed And click on the Continue button............................................passed Then user should get "error"................................................passed

testcase.classname: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow
testcase.name: Valid user enters wrong password - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User is on browser....................................................passed When I navigate to Home page of the Amazon web application..................passed And Go to the Hello,Sign in option..........................................passed And Click on the Sign in link...............................................passed Given User enters the valid phone number "8630718216" into the fieldbox.....passed And click on the Continue button............................................passed And Enter the valid password "Test@123" into password field.................passed And Click on the Sign In button.............................................passed Then user should get "wrong_password".......................................passed

testcase.classname: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow
